_source: NIST Chemistry WebBook (SRD 69), phase-change data: normal boiling points; CO2 saturation at 273.15 K (sublimes at 1 atm, so an above-triple-point saturation datum is used instead).
_gate: PR78 purePsat at the listed temperature must reproduce the measured pressure within relTol. Tolerances are honest per-component bands set at ~1.5x the observed FS2 error; they document PR78 accuracy (sub-1% for most paraffins, worse at low reduced temperature - H2S sits at Tr 0.57 where PR is known to overpredict).
